sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98872" key="sumptwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμ-πτωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n98872.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">secant, ultimately self-intersecting</tr_>, of a curve, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:1p.177F" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1p.177F.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n98872.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">collapsing easily</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:27:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
